pr.title: Record: Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking — 82.14ms/step (3.1% faster than PR #315)

output.summary: Consolidates weights into parameter banks and pairs Polar Express orthogonalization with Parallel Muon’s async reduce-scatter/all-gather to speed optimizer steps.
techniques: Parameter banking replaces many linears with layered views over 3D tensors
Polar Express minimax polynomials tighten orthogonalization every iteration
Parallel Muon schedules bank communication with async reduce-scatter/all-gather overlap
